blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,810 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 55".
